categories.name: (उन्नत बोलचाल एवं अंग्रेज़ी सोच प्रणाली)
categories.intro:
Teacher Introduction
बच्चों, अब तक हमने:
grammar
tense
translation intelligence
real-life English
natural English
error correction
समझ लिया।
अब हम उस स्तर में प्रवेश करेंगे जहाँ:
English केवल subject नहीं रहेगी, बल्कि: सोचने, प्रतिक्रिया देने, तुरंत बोलने, और real communication का माध्यम बन जाएगी।

categories.name: Main Goal of Part 32
categories.intro:
Student:
English में सोचना शुरू करे
hesitation हटाए
fast response देना सीखे
natural conversation flow समझे
real spoken English पकड़ सके
native-style speaking patterns समझ सके

categories.name: Included Systems
categories.intro:
1. Thinking in English System
2. Instant Response System
3. Conversation Flow System
4. Filler Word System
5. Opinion Expression System
6. Agreement & Disagreement System
7. Emotional Spoken English System
8. Real Spoken Compression System
9. Hesitation Removal Drill System
10. Advanced Conversation Drill System

categories.name: 1. Thinking in English System
categories.intro: (अंग्रेज़ी में सोच प्रणाली)

categories.name: Main Problem
categories.intro: अधिकांश students: पहले Hindi में सोचते हैं, फिर English translate करते हैं।

categories.name: Result
categories.intro:
slow speaking
hesitation
broken English
awkward sentence

categories.name: Wrong Process
categories.intro:
Hindi Thought
→ Translation
→ English

categories.name: Correct Process
categories.intro:
Situation
→ Direct English Thought
→ English Speech

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: तुम क्या कर रहे हो?

categories.name: Hindi Thinking Method
categories.intro:
पहले Hindi सोचो
फिर translate करो
⚠️ Slow

categories.name: English Thinking Method
categories.intro:
“What am I doing?”
→ I am studying.
✅ Fast

categories.name: Practice Rule
categories.intro: छोटी-छोटी चीजें: English में सोचना शुरू करो।

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
मैं बैठ रहा हूँ।
→ I am sitting.
मैं पानी पी रहा हूँ।
→ I am drinking water.
मैं बाजार जा रहा हूँ।
→ I am going to the market.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Thinking speed: spoken fluency की जड़ है।

categories.name: 2. Instant Response System
categories.intro: (तुरंत प्रतिक्रिया प्रणाली)

categories.name: Goal
categories.intro: Question सुनते ही: तुरंत reply देना।

categories.name: Slow Response Problem
categories.intro: Student: पहले grammar सोचता है, फिर tense, फिर translation।

categories.name: Real Spoken English
categories.intro: direct response देती है।

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: How are you?

categories.name: Weak Response
categories.intro: ⚠️ I am fine.

categories.name: Better Natural Responses
categories.intro:
✅ I’m doing well.
✅ Pretty good.
✅ I’m fine, thanks.

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: What are you doing?

categories.name: Fast Responses
categories.intro:
✅ I’m studying.
✅ Just relaxing.
✅ Working on something.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Real spoken English: fast reaction चाहती है।

categories.name: 3. Conversation Flow System
categories.intro: (वार्तालाप प्रवाह प्रणाली)

categories.name: Conversation Problem
categories.intro: Students: one-line answer देकर रुक जाते हैं।

categories.name: Weak Conversation
categories.intro:
A: Do you drink tea?
B: Yes.
Conversation dead.

categories.name: Better Conversation
categories.intro:
A: Do you drink tea?
B: Yes, I usually have tea in the evening.

categories.name: Advanced Flow
categories.intro:
A: Do you drink tea?
B: Yes, I usually have tea in the evening with my family.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro:
Conversation: single-word answer नहीं है।
Conversation: flow है।

categories.name: 4. Filler Word System
categories.intro: (वार्तालाप भराव शब्द प्रणाली)

categories.name: What are Fillers?
categories.intro: ऐसे शब्द जो: सोचने का समय देते हैं।

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
Well…
Actually…
Honestly…
Basically…
You know…
I mean…
Let me think…

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: What do you think about English?

categories.name: Natural Spoken Reply
categories.intro: Well, I think English is very important nowadays.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Native speakers भी: हर sentence instantly perfect नहीं बोलते।

categories.name: 5. Opinion Expression System
categories.intro: (मत अभिव्यक्ति प्रणाली)

categories.name: Giving Opinion
categories.intro:
In my opinion…
मेरे विचार से
I think…
मुझे लगता है
As far as I know…
जहाँ तक मैं जानता हूँ
Personally speaking…
व्यक्तिगत रूप से

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
I think English is important.
In my opinion, practice is the key to fluency.
Personally speaking, spoken English needs confidence.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Opinion English: daily communication का बड़ा हिस्सा है।

categories.name: 6. Agreement & Disagreement System
categories.intro: (सहमति एवं असहमति प्रणाली)

categories.name: Agreement
categories.intro:
I agree with you.
मैं आपसे सहमत हूँ।
You are right.
आप सही हैं।
Exactly!
बिल्कुल!
That’s true.
यह सही है।

categories.name: Soft Disagreement
categories.intro:
I do not think so.
मैं ऐसा नहीं सोचता।
Maybe, but…
शायद, लेकिन…
I see your point, but…
मैं आपकी बात समझता हूँ, लेकिन…

categories.name: Strong Disagreement
categories.intro:
I completely disagree.
मैं पूरी तरह असहमत हूँ।
That is not correct.
यह सही नहीं है।

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: English में disagreement भी politely किया जाता है।

categories.name: 7. Emotional Spoken English System
categories.intro: (भावनात्मक बोलचाल अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: Excitement
categories.intro:
That’s amazing!
यह अद्भुत है!
Awesome!
शानदार!

categories.name: Surprise
categories.intro:
Really?
सच में?
No way!
ऐसा नहीं हो सकता!

categories.name: Frustration
categories.intro:
This is so annoying.
यह बहुत परेशान करने वाला है।
I am fed up with this.
मैं इससे तंग आ चुका हूँ।

categories.name: Happiness
categories.intro:
I’m really happy today.
मैं आज बहुत खुश हूँ।

categories.name: Sadness
categories.intro:
I feel terrible.
मैं बहुत बुरा महसूस कर रहा हूँ।

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Emotion: spoken English को natural बनाता है।

categories.name: 8. Real Spoken Compression System
categories.intro: (वास्तविक बोलचाल संक्षिप्तीकरण प्रणाली)

categories.name: Formal English
categories.intro: I am going home.

categories.name: Natural Spoken English
categories.intro: I’m going home.

categories.name: Formal English
categories.intro: Do not worry.

categories.name: Spoken English
categories.intro: Don’t worry.

categories.name: Formal English
categories.intro: I will not do this.

categories.name: Spoken English
categories.intro: I won’t do this.

categories.name: Advanced Compression
categories.intro:
Want to
→ wanna
Going to
→ gonna
Give me
→ gimme

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
I’m gonna call you later.
मैं तुम्हें बाद में कॉल करने वाला हूँ।

categories.name: Important Note
categories.intro: यह informal spoken English है, formal writing नहीं।

categories.name: 9. Hesitation Removal Drill System
categories.intro: (हिचकिचाहट हटाने की अभ्यास प्रणाली)

categories.name: Main Problem
categories.intro: Student: गलती से डरता है।

categories.name: Result
categories.intro:
silence
hesitation
slow speaking

categories.name: Important Rule
categories.intro:
Broken English
is better than
silent fear.

categories.name: Practice Method
categories.intro:
एक sentence को:
slowly
normally
fast
तीनों speed में बोलो।

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
I am learning English.
I’m learning English.
I’m learning English every day.

categories.name: Daily Thinking Drill
categories.intro: सुबह उठते ही: English में सोचना शुरू करो।

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
I need water.
I am feeling sleepy.
I have to study today.

categories.name: 10. Advanced Conversation Drill System
categories.intro: (उन्नत वार्तालाप अभ्यास प्रणाली)

categories.name: Situation 1 — Opinion
categories.intro:
A: What do you think about mobile phones?
B: Well, I think mobile phones are useful, but overuse is dangerous.

categories.name: Situation 2 — Agreement
categories.intro:
A: English is important nowadays.
B: Yes, I completely agree with you.

categories.name: Situation 3 — Disagreement
categories.intro:
A: Grammar is not important.
B: I do not think so. Grammar is the foundation of language.

categories.name: Situation 4 — Emotional Reaction
categories.intro:
A: I passed the exam.
B: That’s amazing! Congratulations!

categories.name: Situation 5 — Instant Response
categories.intro:
A: What are you doing?
B: Just studying English.

categories.name: Final Spoken Intelligence Formula
categories.intro:
Grammar
+
Thinking Speed
+
Confidence
+
Natural Expression
+
Instant Response
+
Emotion
Advanced Spoken English

categories.name: Final Goal of Part 32
categories.intro:
Student:
English में सोचना शुरू करे
hesitation कम करे
instant reply दे सके
natural conversation कर सके
emotional English समझ सके
filler words use कर सके
confidence के साथ बोल सके
real spoken fluency विकसित कर सके।
